expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: cross-section interaction audit catches template x pause-mode and prompt-editor-open states
expectations.evidence: In result.md the run concludes these interactions were missed rather than explicitly covered/enforced: “Therefore, the Phase 5a cross-section interaction audit did not catch … the *template × pause-mode* scenario chain.” and “the plan missed coverage around the **prompt-editor-open** state… Verdict: **FAIL (blocking).**” Execution notes also state: “Blocking expectation not met… misses in cross-section interactions involving template × pause mode … and prompt-editor-open … behavior.”

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly framed as Phase 5a and evaluates Phase 5a rubric requirements: “Primary phase under test: **Phase 5a**” and “Per `references/review-rubric-phase5a.md`, Phase 5a review notes must include `## Cross-Section Interaction Audit`…”. It also records: “Verdict: **PASS (alignment confirmed)**” for Expectation 2.
